title: Bacon Stir Fry
description: A quick and easy Japanese-inspired stir fry with crispy bacon and tangy flavors. Perfect for a weeknight dinner.
instructions: Cook the bacon in a large skillet over medium heat until crispy.
Remove the bacon from the skillet and set aside.
Add the mixed vegetables to the skillet and cook until tender.
Pour in the stir-fry sauce and soy sauce (if using) and stir to combine.
Return the cooked bacon to the skillet and stir to combine.
Stir in the crushed ginger and cook for an additional 1-2 minutes.
Transfer the stir fry to a serving platter and garnish with green onions.
Optional: Serve with steamed rice or noodles for a filling meal.
